title: Iceburg’s Warning
description: While the crew tries to move forward, Water Seven’s political tension around Iceburg and Robin deepens.
scene: Across pages 12, 13, 14, 15, this part follows Paulie, Luffy, Iceburg, Nico Robin, Nami. While the crew tries to move forward, Water Seven’s political tension around Iceburg and Robin deepens.

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: I'm the one who hates him!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Why are the Carpen-ters our enemies, too!?

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Wait!! I still don't get why....!!

summary: While the crew tries to move forward, Water Seven’s political tension around Iceburg and Robin deepens.
